Class ProofScriptArgument

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.scripts.meta.ProofScriptArgument
public class ProofScriptArgument extends Object

This class captures the meta data about parameters of

invalid reference 
ProofScriptCommand
s.

The meta information are found by various annotations.

See Also:

  • Option
